blended.narrative: Giants Ridge is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,951 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
